generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important our alliances are for national security. But have you considered how much we're really carrying the burden? New data shows our allies are falling behind in defense spending - it's time we focus on securing our own interests first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
